title: rosa × dumetorum f. sylvestris
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. sylvestris, also known as the wild rose or prickly rose, is a plant species in the family Rosaceae that is characterized by its dense thorny stems and fragrant, pink or white flowers. The medicinal properties of Rosa × dumetorum f. sylvestris include its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Rosa × dumetorum f. sylvestris can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as insomnia, anxiety, and menstrual cramps.
